pi_items.source: setup_task.sh dynamically creates 25 agents within a loop where NAME="temp-test-${i}".
setup_task.sh explicitly executes manage_agents -a for 'production-web' and 'production-db'. verifier.py verifies these names and checks for the manager node (ID '000').
setup_task.sh removes all non-000 agents, then adds 2 production agents and 25 temp-test agents (28 total). Removing 25 temp-test agents results in exactly 3 remaining.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetically generated Wazuh agent data. setup_task.sh first wipes all non-manager agents (leaving only agent 000). It then dynamically registers 2 production agents ('production-web' and 'production-db') and 25 stale agents using a bash loop with the pattern 'temp-test-01' through 'temp-test-25'. Consequently, the agent environment starts with exactly 28 agents. If an agent correctly removes all 25 'temp-test-' agents without removing the manager or the production agents, exactly 3 agents will remain, satisfying the verifier's checks.
